reason: packages/engine is unimplemented until Wave 2.1a (ROADMAP.md). Families listed here are skipped by src/vectors.test.ts, whose guard tests fail if a listed family gains an engine implementation or loses its vector files.

foreign.reason: client-store's consumer is apps/web's store (Wave 2.1d) and later the iOS store, never packages/engine (PROTOCOL.md §13). The engine runner discovers and shape-validates these vectors but never executes them; execution lives in apps/web's and the iOS suites. Unlike `families`, a foreign family is never bound to the engine and never leaves this list, so the Wave 2.1a per-family rebind that drains `families` must not touch it.
